SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class VisitDTO

java.lang.Object
common.dto.VisitDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class VisitDTO extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable data transfer object representing a single visit row — one party's actual entry into a park (by reservation or as a casual walk-in).

Created server-side by VisitDAO from a database row and serialized across the socket to the client inside a ServerResponse (e.g. the gate screen echoing the visit just opened/closed). As with ReservationDTO, the DATETIME columns are carried as strings (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss) so the wire format is not coupled to java.sql types.

Columns that are nullable in the database are modelled with boxed types so a SQL NULL maps to a Java null rather than a misleading zero:

  • reservationId — null for a casual walk-in;
  • visitorId — null for an anonymous casual party;
  • exitedAt — null while the party is still inside;
  • priceCents / visitType — persisted only for casual visits; null on a reservation visit (derive them from the reservation instead).
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private String
    enteredAt
    Entry timestamp (DB DATETIME as string).
    private String
    exitedAt
    Exit timestamp (DB DATETIME as string), or null while still inside.
    private int
    headcount
    Number of people in the party counted against occupancy.
    private int
    id
    Unique visit identifier (primary key).
    private int
    parkId
    Identifier of the park entered.
    private Integer
    priceCents
    Price charged in cents (casual visits only), or null for a reservation visit.
    private Integer
    reservationId
    Identifier of the backing reservation, or null for a casual walk-in.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization identifier for this class.
    private Long
    visitorId
    National-ID-style identifier of the visitor, or null if anonymous.
    private VisitType
    visitType
    Nature of the visit (casual visits only), or null for a reservation visit.

  • Constructor Details

    • VisitDTO

      public VisitDTO(int id, Integer reservationId, int parkId, Long visitorId, String enteredAt, String exitedAt, int headcount, Integer priceCents, VisitType visitType)
      Creates a fully populated visit.
      Parameters:
      id - unique visit identifier
      reservationId - identifier of the backing reservation, or null if casual
      parkId - identifier of the park entered
      visitorId - identifier of the visitor, or null if anonymous
      enteredAt - entry timestamp as a string
      exitedAt - exit timestamp as a string, or null while still inside
      headcount - number of people in the party
      priceCents - price charged in cents (casual only), or null
      visitType - nature of the visit (casual only), or null
